expanded_en.expanded_definition_en: A student is an individual who is actively engaged in the process of learning, typically within an educational institution, and is formally enrolled in a course or program of study. This person is characterized by their pursuit of knowledge and skills, often under the guidance of educators, and may be involved in various academic activities. The term encompasses a wide range of learners, including those in primary, secondary, and higher education, and can refer to individuals specializing in specific fields, such as medical students or law students. Students may also be categorized based on their academic performance, such as overachievers or underachievers, and their enrollment status, including full-time or part-time students. The relationship between students and their teachers is a fundamental aspect of the educational experience, highlighting the collaborative nature of learning.
notes_en: The definition emphasizes the active role of students in learning.
It captures the diversity of students across different educational levels and fields.

expanded_sr.expanded_definition_sr: Student je pojedinac koji je aktivno uključen u proces učenja, obično unutar obrazovne institucije, i formalno je upisan u kurs ili program studija. Ova osoba se odlikuje težnjom ka sticanju znanja i veština, često pod vođstvom nastavnika, i može biti uključena u različite akademske aktivnosti. Pojam obuhvata širok spektar učenika, uključujući one u osnovnom, srednjem i visokom obrazovanju, i može se odnositi na pojedince koji se specijalizuju u određenim oblastima, kao što su studenti medicine ili prava. Studenti se takođe mogu kategorizovati na osnovu akademskih postignuća, kao što su nadprosečni ili ispodprosečni učenici, i statusa upisa, uključujući studente na puno ili deo radno vreme. Odnos između studenata i njihovih nastavnika je osnovni aspekt obrazovnog iskustva, naglašavajući kolaborativnu prirodu učenja.
notes_sr: Definicija naglašava aktivnu ulogu studenata u učenju.
Obuhvata raznolikost studenata kroz različite obrazovne nivoe i oblasti.
